subject: refactor(content): switch spacers and line separators from per-group to per-element
body:
User requested per-element granularity instead of per-group. Each text element
(title, tagline, bodyHeading, bodyText, cta, footnote) now has its own
spacerAbove/spacerBelow/lineAbove/lineBelow controls.

- textDefaults: removed defaultGroupSpacing, added spacer/line fields to defaultTextLayer
- ContentTab: removed GroupSpacingControls, added per-element controls in TextElementEditor
- AdCanvas: replaced textGroupDefs/renderGroupDecorations with renderElementDecorations,
  rewrote renderTextElementsForCell to iterate flat element list

Tags: text, content, canvas, ui
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: text-decorations
Semver: minor

title: switch spacers and line separators from per-group to per-element
